title: rubus psilophyllus
intro: Rubus psilophyllus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of thorny shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus psilophyllus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in the treatment of digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Rubus psilophyllus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
